document_id: 4-5.FL.2 Rubric for Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning
source_file: 4-5.FL.2 Rubric for Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning.pdf

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Rubric for Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning::000
chunks.text: My goals are clearly stated. My goals are stated, but are unclear. My goals are vague or not clearly stated. My goals are missing.
heading_path: Criteria Excellent Satisfactory Needs Improvement Incomplete Goals

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Rubric for Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning::001
chunks.text: My goals are clearly defined with specific details. My goals are somewhat defined but lack details. My goals are vague or not specific at all. My goals are unclear or missing.
heading_path: Criteria Excellent Satisfactory Needs Improvement Incomplete Goals

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Rubric for Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning::002
chunks.text: My goals include clear criteria for measuring progress. My goals are measurable, but they are not very clear My goals do not include any measurable criteria. My goals are missing measurable criteria.
heading_path: Criteria Excellent Satisfactory Needs Improvement Incomplete Goals

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Rubric for Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning::003
chunks.text: My goals are realistic and attainable. My goals are realistic but may not be attainable. My goals are not realistic or attainable. My goals are missing achievability.
heading_path: Criteria Excellent Satisfactory Needs Improvement Incomplete Goals

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Rubric for Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning::004
chunks.text: My goals are relevant and meaningful to me. My goals are relevant, but not strongly meaningful. My goals are not very relevant or meaningful. My goals are not relevant or meaningful.
heading_path: Criteria Excellent Satisfactory Needs Improvement Incomplete Goals

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Rubric for Handout B. SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning::005
chunks.text: My goals include a clear timeframe for completion. My goals include a timeframe, but it is not clear. My goals do not include a timeframe. My goals are missing a timeframe.
heading_path: Criteria Excellent Satisfactory Needs Improvement Incomplete Goals
